name: Grupo X - Webhook NVD -> Export JSON

parameters.jsCode: const vulnerabilities = items.map((item) => item.json); const counts = vulnerabilities.reduce((acc, vuln) => { acc.total += 1; acc[vuln.ircLevel] = (acc[vuln.ircLevel] ?? 0) + 1; return acc; }, { total: 0, alta: 0, media: 0, baja: 0 }); const payload = { generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), source: 'NVD API', total: counts.total, summary: { alta: counts.alta, media: counts.media, baja: counts.baja }, vulnerabilities }; return [ { json: payload } ];
